# Civic-Influence-Graph Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-26

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.x (Node.js 20 LTS) for backend services, ingestion, and P2P; TypeScript/React for frontend and browser extension + Next.js 14+, FastAPI or tRPC (API layer), WebLLM (client-side AI), Cytoscape.js (graph viz), OpenSearch 2.x (search), Pear P2P modules (hypercore, hyperbee, hyperdrive, hyperswarm, hyperdht, corestore, localdrive, mirror-drive), GunDB (optional collaborative overlay) (001-civic-influence-platform)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x (Node.js 20 LTS) for backend services, ingestion, and P2P; TypeScript/React for frontend and browser extension: Follow standard conventions

## Recent Changes

- 001-civic-influence-platform: Added TypeScript 5.x (Node.js 20 LTS) for backend services, ingestion, and P2P; TypeScript/React for frontend and browser extension + Next.js 14+, FastAPI or tRPC (API layer), WebLLM (client-side AI), Cytoscape.js (graph viz), OpenSearch 2.x (search), Pear P2P modules (hypercore, hyperbee, hyperdrive, hyperswarm, hyperdht, corestore, localdrive, mirror-drive), GunDB (optional collaborative overlay)
